name: Asleep at the Grill Barbecued Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except the ribs) in a blender and process until smooth.
2. Place the ribs in a shallow baking dish. Pour the sauce over the ribs, turning to coat them well.
3. Marinate for 8 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat. Cook the ribs for 1 hour, turning every 20 minutes.
5. Close the top vents halfway through cooking time to lower the temperature.
6. Brush the ribs frequently with sauce for about 30 minutes.
